media.base_medium: Custom defined freshwater DNRA medium (NaCl/CaCl2/MgCl2/NH4Cl + 1000x trace element solution + Wolin's vitamin solution + PIPES buffer + KH2PO4), gas-fed H2/CO2/N2; described in Heo et al. 2025 (this paper) Materials and Methods and Supplementary Table S1.

sources_chased.what: Supplementary Table S1 (1000x trace element solution) referenced in main text
sources_chased.how: curl EuropePMC supplementaryFiles zip -> parsed supplementary_material_wraf092_(revised).docx word/document.xml

sources_chased.what: Wolin's vitamin solution composition (named stock, no citation in paper)
sources_chased.how: WebSearch + WebFetch/pdftotext of DSMZ bacmedia solution 242 (Wolin's vitamin solution, from medium 141)

media.notes: Base salts, acetate, nitrate and H2/CO2/N2 gas are in the main text; the trace element solution (added 1 ml/L of a 1000x stock) was fully recovered from Supplementary Table S1; the uncited 'Wolin's vitamin solution' was expanded from the standard DSMZ medium-141 composition. Trace-element final concentrations assume 1000x dilution (1 ml stock per L). The volume of Wolin's vitamin solution added per liter is not stated in the paper, so vitamin final concentrations are left null (constituents and stock concentrations reported). W and Se are notable trace additions relevant to this hydrogenotroph/formate metabolism; Ni is the NiFe-hydrogenase cofactor.
